user.title: Electric Ireland Insights (Unofficial)
user.description: Enter your Electric Ireland online account credentials. This is an unofficial, community-built integration not affiliated with Electric Ireland.

data_description.username: Your Electric Ireland online account email address
data_description.password: Your Electric Ireland online account password

account.title: Select Account
account.description: {num_accounts} electricity account(s) found for this login. Select which account to configure.

options.title: Import Options
options.description: Full historical import is enabled by default. It fetches all available data from your bill periods (typically 6–13 months) as a background task. This involves many sequential requests to the Electric Ireland portal and may take 10–30 minutes. Uncheck if you only want the last 30 days.

data_description.import_full_history: Fetch all available historical data from your bill periods. Default is ON. This runs in the background, issues many sequential requests to the Electric Ireland portal, and may take 10–30 minutes. There is a small rate-limit risk during this one-time import. Uncheck to import only the last 30 days now; you can trigger full history later via Reconfigure.
data_description.discount_percentage: Enter your discount percentage (e.g., 20 for 20% Saver discount). A separate '_cost_discounted' statistic will be created with the discount applied. Standing charges are not included.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials have expired. Please re-enter your password.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure
reconfigure.description: Update your password, discount, or clear cached meter identifiers for {username}.

data.force_rediscovery: Re-discover meter IDs from the portal

data_description.password: Your current portal password (re-enter even if unchanged)
data_description.force_rediscovery: Clear cached meter identifiers (partner, contract, premise) and re-discover them from the portal on the next data refresh. Use this if data imports have stopped but your credentials are correct.
data_description.import_full_history: Fetch all available historical data from your bill periods (typically 6–13 months). This runs as a background task and may take 10–30 minutes. Only needed once — subsequent polls keep data current automatically.
data_description.discount_percentage: Enter your discount percentage (e.g., 20 for 20% Saver discount). A separate '_cost_discounted' statistic will be created with the discount applied. To recalculate existing discounted data, select Import full history after changing the discount.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Electric Ireland portal. Please check your internet connection.
error.account_not_found: No electricity accounts found for this user.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the portal during account setup
abort.account_not_found: The selected account could not be verified

data_gap.title: No new energy data for {days} days
data_gap.description: Account {account} has not received new energy data for {days} days. This typically happens when ESB meter reads are delayed. The integration will automatically resume importing when data becomes available.
